TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == sapaculi tu Tukiw śĚĪšļ¨ŚććŚĺ©šĽáŤÄÖ == kakungkuan śēÖšļčŚ§ßÁ∂Ī kalingatuan ťĖčÁęĮ ci Hua-tan-u-taw makamilaw tu naayaway a mamidang ci Ci-ze-sing-ci-ci milab utu "TukeŚććkaput"tunŚćć nikalalebuaan a mapatay nu sinwengan, kilul sa tu nikahetikan nida i dadan nu silamalay masimsim nida tu nipicudad tu Kuocung tusaay a mihcaan, tiayawan nida musakamu ci nida sakatayni anu ayaw, cima ku matunengay hedek sa musakamu makakamel ku lima', ci U-taw taluma'tu tusepcaypic mihcaan nu ayda, ku mamapatyay a tademaw ci Ce-zen malakincal a tahekal. ci Ce-zen miuningay ci U-tawan taluma' tu tusepseplim mihcaan, miput tu tunŚćć naw hinadebitay a tademaw malalumuwa a " Cuo-ye-wan-ce-lang" aci "Si-cen-te-tay" malalikelun. . ci U-taw mibetas, masasutineng aci TunŚććsakakaay ci Wang-ce'-lang aci Lung-kun-se-cin, matapal nida caay kaw la'cusay a tademaw, atu makatalay ci TunŚćć, aydaaay amikilim tu sakatineng tu tawyaay i Lun-ku miyuan anikapatay nu nikalalebuan nu TunŚćć. . kacinlawan peizi ť¨•Áą≠ÁĮá katukuh ci U-taw tu tusepseplim mihcaan, ci TunŚććmangalay paculi ci " aymei-aycu" a nikalingatu a malalebu, amica ku nikakaci, nika ci TunŚććidaw ku nidikecan tu katini' mipacuk tu aymei-aycu nu sakakaay, sadikuday mihang aku ku mipatayay sa, ci Wang-ce'-lang aci Lung-kun-se saemaema sa. ci U-taw milawlaw tu nikasasungaay nu heni a tatusa, mangalay misudikud tu aymei-aycu masakaputay atu ci TunŚćć, midebung tu i walu bulad tulu demiad tu Lung-kun-se', nika ina Lung-kun-se' kaidawan ni U-taw sa maala. mutiku tu ayda, masumad tu ku dui't, ci Ze'-sing maudip aca, nika caay ka tenes ci Ze'-sing idaw ku nipikiyakuan ni TunŚćć nu sakasizikuan a mapatay. ci U-taw matineng tu ci Lung-kun-se'-cin malamamapatay i papululan, u cumi nida u tapang namin ku mituu'ay. ś≠¶ťĀďŤá≥2005ŚĻī, . tanuidang nu wang-sen-cie Ť°ÄŤÖ•Ťź¨ŤĀĖÁĮÄÁĮá yu mahida ci U-taw namiawda tu "pa-liw-pa'-luo" mamiwawies, ci Tun Śććnamicunus tu icelang sapabeli ci Yen-ay-mei-ay-cu nu si-siaw malacen-hun kaput nu sakakaay. yi-fan sakakaay ci Cen-ti-kuy-cie mibelih tayda ci Pa-liw-pa'-luoan, sakatusa nu sakakaay ci Sun-ye-cin-tun saan musakamu, ci Cen-ti u taydaay malasepay u mamikilim ci Si-siwan nu minikudanay a siwmian. ci U-taw matineng tu anikalepacawan : malumanay ni TunŚćća tademaw ci Yi-kun-yi-hu pacuk han nida ci Cen-ti, ci Wang-ce'-lang amipaty ci Yi-huan, ci Si-siaw milinikudan tu patay malasakakaay. tusa malebut mihcaan cacay a bataan bulad tulu a bataan idaw ku cacay nu demiad, mi'ten ci nida tu nikasikawawan, sadikuday mapatay tu ci Cen-ti, nika ci Yi-hu caay ka patay, maala ni U-taw. . sa ci U-taw malayi-hun kaput nu sakakaay, mutiku aca tayni tu aydaay ci TunŚććmalasakakaay tu, saan ku tadasakakaay ci Si-siaw tu ci U-taw, Cin-tun u sepay ku nu heni sa, tusepcaypic mihcaan caycay bulad caywal demiad, kuwangen ni Si-siaw ci Cin-tun, mahka tahekalay namaka papululan nanay ci Yi-hu alaen nida ci U-taw, saan ci Yi-hu malacaculculen ci U-taw sa, tiiken setulen tukuden a maynah ci U-taw, sakamu han ci U-taw amana pisakuakuay han, ci U-taw palita han ni Yi-hu tu aydaay nida a kawaw, misuayaw tu la'cusay a tademaw ci Mikey, sakamu han ni U-taw ci TunŚćć ci Si-siaw atu ci Yen-hei-lung misakaput sa masumad, mangalay tu a edapan ni U-taw. ,ŚįćśĖľMikeyÁöĄś•ĶśÉ°, . masikad ci U-taw tuci TunŚććngan, saan cu nida ku mipatayay ci Ci-tungan, sakamusa ci Yi-hu ci Si-siaw ku mipatayay tu ci Cin-tungan a lalekalan u ci Cin-tun kina paciciay. ci Yi-hu alaen nida ci U-taw patayda ci Ce-zenan, nika ci Ce-zen amidakep ci U-tawan, sakasaan kainayi'an nu lahecian ayda ni U-taw mangalay cidida tu ku mipatayay ci Ci-ze-sin'gan. sadikuday ci U-taw masasukamel ku lima misetul aca katuku tu tusepseplim mihcaan. ci U-taw micucucu ci Yi-hu, Cin-tun tu nitungihan, paytemsa ci nida a bahbahen ci Si-siaw aci Yen-hei-lun-cu patayda ci TunŚććngan, mahinikya caay ka hidasa nayi' ku laheci. ,ťÄôś®£MikeyśČćšłćśúÉŚĘģŤźĹšłčŚéĽ. pikulisimasean nu nikalepacawan peizi ŤĀĖŚ§úśĪļśąįÁĮá ci U-taw mutiku aca tayda tu tusepseplim mihcaan maadih nida nu miliyasay ci TunŚćć a Cay-pa-cie, yamipatayay tu kaka ci Hei-lung sakakaay ci Cay-ta-suo nipiladay nida milabu tina Hei-lung Tun Śćć. saan palaheci ci Cin-tun tu nipibetasan a kawawan, misuayaw ayda ci Cin-tun tu sakapaty ni U-taw, misuayaw ci Pa-cie-yi mipatayay a kaka mamiala tu nisawacuan a kaka ci Yiu-yean, simata tu nuhenian aci Hei-lung tu nikakapahan a cudadan, itini satu i sasa a miput tu nu henian. tusepseplim mihcaan sabaw tusa bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku lima demiad, ci Si-siaw aci Pan-cin paceba manglay a miedap, ci U-taw nu tademaw aci Hei-lun masasuad, tatengaay nu mipatayay a tademaw ci Yiu-ye itini tu a mipatay nika caay ka laheci, sadikuday ci Wang-ce'-lang tayda kitidaan misupit ci Ta-suoan. . mademec tu kaku sa ci Hei-lung, milaylayay ci Cin, Ciw-cin sakamusa milab utu TunŚćć, ci Si-siaw papabelien ci U-siaw-tau tu katini' mipacuk ci TunŚćć pasu ci Lin-pan-ci. Si-saiw lawpesen ni Mikey ku ngangan ni TunŚćć, palasikian tu ci Tun Śćć nu tusaay a siicelangay hida satu makaykic, baluhay a mihcaan ci U-taw mutikuaca tayni tu aydaay, maadih nida ci Pu-tan siziku mapaty, u masakaputay ni TunŚććmatulin a mapatay, ya mipatayay han ci Wan-ce'-lan. ci Wan-ce'-lang miawda ci U-tawan patayen ci nida sa, tunika lalebuan nina tatusaay ci Ce-zen sipakay tapiingan a mikuwang ci Wan-ce'-langan, paytem satu ci U-taw amiala tu katuuday sisa misetul aca milakuuyt tu naayaway tu tusepseplim mihcaan. Mikey 2005ŚĻī. Ten-cu peizi Ś§©ÁęļÁĮá tusepsepnem a Heng-pin nu masakaputay "Ten-cu" midebung ci TunŚććngan, ci U-taw makatengil tu kamu nida i Ten-cuay a cabayen ci He'-tei sakamusa ku sakakaay ci Hei-cuan- yi-cuo cukaymasen ni Si-siaw sa. makatukuh ci U-taw tu aydaay mamikilim tu zingbuan lalikeluh sa aci Cay-ta-seo, sakamu han nida cini U-taw aci Ce-zen tu tawyaay nu mihcaan a kawawan " kun-tun-se-pen" nu hedek u Ten-cu aci TunŚććnikalepacawan a mapulung, u sakakaay han ci Wan-ce'-lang, kilul sa ci Si-siaw, Yi-cuo-na, nikudan sa ci TunŚććmalasicumiay nu masakaputay. 2006 . masasakamu ku nu heni ci TunŚćć a tademaw manglay a midakep ci U-taw zi Ce-zen, ya tatusaay kuwang han mapatay, ci U-taw aci pihacengay nu dukaan ci Ce-zen makakamel tu lima setul satu. aitida tu Hei-lung patideng tu demiadan nu tusa a buald tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa dimiadan tuya labiyi a masasetset, duma a tapiingan ci Si-siaw patayen nida ci Ay-ma, mahiniay nu caayay a lemed ci Wan-ce'-lang Lung-kun-se' naynayi tu ku laheci, macunus ni TunŚćć nu tusaay a sakakaay sidepan a maduka, ci U-fan kaput ku mihantayay, duma a tademaw ku caay pilihida a milepacaw, nika nikaydaan ni U-taw aci Ci-tun nu nikalawlawan, hida sat uku katuuday. ci Ze-sin misuayaw ci Wan-ce'-lan aci Lung-kun-se' patahekalan nida ku kakawaw ni U-taw, sa hida satu ku nu heni tatulu a malalebu, sadikuday ci Yi-cuo-na tu nikalalebuan mademec ni Wan-ce'-lang, sa ala han ci He-tei patayen naca ci Si-siaw a mipatay, ci Si-saiw han tu nika zikuan a mapatay. . tulu a demiad a nikalepacawan peizi šłČŚ§©śąįÁą≠ÁĮá taluma' tu tawyaay ci U-taw itida i aci Ze'-sin pikikungan kuwangen patayen ni MLKEY, ci MLKEY mangalay tu nipiala mibetas aca tayda tu caca nu bataan. tusepsepwal mihcaan pitu bulad pitu demiad, Kun-tun Śćć atu tuluay nu kaputan makaci. tusepsepwal mihcaan siwa bulad siwa demiad, ci U-taw mililid tu E-tay-mu-tun-cinŚććmidademec tu MLKEYnu Kun-tunŚććsa pacuken tu katini'. sadikuday ci MIKEY aci U-taw tatusa mibetas aca katukuh tu wawa nu zitayan, misumad ci Si-siaw atu katuuday tu nikasasuadaan.

tu nikakapańßan a ¶udadan, itini satu i sasa a miput tu nu ńß…ônian. tus…ôps…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima d…ômiad, ¶i si-siaw a ¶i pan- ¶in pa ¶…ôba maŇčr~…ĺaj a mi…ôdap, ¶i u-taw nu tad…ômaw a ¶i ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun masasuad, tat…ôŇčaaj nu mipatajaj a tad…ômaw ¶i jiu-j…ô itini tu a mipataj nika ¶aaj ka r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, sadikudaj ¶i waŇč- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč tajda ¶i tun* pasu ¶i r~…ĺin-pan- ¶i. si-saiw r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn ni mik…ô ku ŇčaŇčan ni tun*, par~…ĺasikian tu ¶i tun * nu tusaaj a sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ńßida satu makajki ¶, bar~…ĺuńßaj a mińß ¶aan ¶i u-taw mutikua ¶a tajni tu ajdaaj, maadińß nida ¶i pu-tan siziku mapatj, u masakaputaj ni tun*matur~…ĺin a mapataj, ja mipatajaj ńßan ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan. ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč miawda ¶i u-tawan pataj…ôn ¶i nida sa, tunika r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbuan nina tatusaaj ¶i ¶…ô-z…ôn sipakaj tapiiŇčan a mikuwaŇč ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇčan, pajt…ôm satu ¶i u-taw amiar~…ĺa tu katuudaj sisa mis…ôtur~…ĺ a ¶a mir~…ĺakuujt tu naajawaj tu tus…ôps…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan. mik…ô *****. t…ôn- ¶u p…ôizi *** tus…ôps…ôpn…ôm a ńß…ôŇč-pin nu masakaputaj "t…ôn- ¶u" mid…ôbuŇč ¶i tun*Ňčan, ¶i u-taw makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kamu nida i t…ôn- ¶uaj a ¶abaj…ôn ¶i ńß…ô Ē~ °-t…ôi sakamusa ku sakakaaj ¶i ńß…ôi- ¶uan- ji- ¶uo ¶ukajmas…ôn ni si-siaw sa. makatukuńß ¶i u-taw tu ajdaaj mamikir~…ĺim tu ziŇčbuan r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß sa a ¶i ¶aj-ta-s…ôo, sakamu ńßan nida ¶ini u-taw a ¶i ¶…ô-z…ôn tu tawjaaj nu mińß ¶aan a kawawan " kun-tun-s…ô-p…ôn" nu ńß…ôd…ôk u t…ôn- ¶u a ¶i tun*nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a mapur~…ĺuŇč, u sakakaaj ńßan ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa ¶i si-siaw, ji- ¶uo-na, nikudan sa ¶i tun*mar~…ĺasi ¶umiaj nu masakaputaj. **** . masasakamu ku nu ńß…ôni ¶i tun* a tad…ômaw maŇčr~…ĺaj a midak…ôp ¶i u-taw zi ¶…ô-z…ôn, ja tatusaaj kuwaŇč ńßan mapataj, ¶i u-taw a ¶i pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu dukaan ¶i ¶…ô-z…ôn makakam…ôr~…ĺ tu r~…ĺima s…ôtur~…ĺ satu. aitida tu ńß…ôi-r~…ĺuŇč patid…ôŇč tu d…ômiadan nu tusa a buar~…ĺd tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa dimiadan tuja r~…ĺabiji a masas…ôts…ôt, duma a tapiiŇčan ¶i si-siaw pataj…ôn nida ¶i aj-ma, mańßiniaj nu ¶aajaj a r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč r~…ĺuŇč-kun-s…ô Ē~ ° najnaji tu ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, ma ¶unus ni tun* nu tusaaj a sakakaaj sid…ôpan a maduka, ¶i u-fan kaput ku mińßantajaj, duma a tad…ômaw ku ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida a mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, nika nikajdaan ni u-taw a ¶i ¶i-tun nu nikar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, ńßida sat uku katuudaj. ¶i z…ô-sin misuajaw ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan a ¶i r~…ĺuŇč-kun-s…ô Ē~ ° patańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida ku kakawaw ni u-taw, sa ńßida satu ku nu ńß…ôni tatur~…ĺu a mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu, sadikudaj ¶i ji- ¶uo-na tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbuan mad…ôm…ô ¶ ni wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč, sa ar~…ĺa ńßan ¶i ńß…ô-t…ôi pataj…ôn na ¶a ¶i si-siaw a mipataj, ¶i si-saiw ńßan tu nika zikuan a mapataj. . tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan p…ôizi ***** tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu tawjaaj ¶i u-taw itida i a ¶i z…ô Ē~ °-sin pikikuŇčan kuwaŇč…ôn pataj…ôn ni mr~…ĺk…ôj, ¶i mr~…ĺk…ôj maŇčar~…ĺaj tu nipiar~…ĺa mib…ôtas a ¶a tajda tu ¶a ¶a nu bataan. tus…ôps…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan pitu bur~…ĺad pitu d…ômiad, kun-tun * atu tur~…ĺuaj nu kaputan maka ¶i. tus…ôps…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad siwa d…ômiad, ¶i u-taw mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu …ô-taj-mu-tun- ¶in*midad…ôm…ô ¶ tu mr~…ĺk…ôjnu kun-tun*sa pa ¶uk…ôn tu katini Ē~ °. sadikudaj ¶i mik…ôj a ¶i u-taw tatusa mib…ôtas a ¶a katukuńß tu wawa nu zitajan, misumad ¶i si-siaw atu katuudaj tu nikasasuadaan.
S.FORM: == sapaculi tu Tukiw śĚĪšļ¨ŚććŚĺ©šĽáŤÄÖ == kakungkuan śēÖšļčŚ§ßÁ∂Ī kalingatuan ťĖčÁęĮ ci Hua-tan-u-taw makamilaw tu naayaway a mamidang ci Ci-ze-sing-ci-ci milab utu "TukeŚććkaput"tunŚćć nikalalebuaan a mapatay nu sinwengan, kilul sa tu nikahetikan nida i dadan nu silamalay masimsim nida tu nipicudad tu Kuocung tusaay a mihcaan, tiayawan nida musakamu ci nida sakatayni anu ayaw, cima ku matunengay hedek sa musakamu makakamel ku lima', ci U-taw taluma'tu tusepcaypic mihcaan nu ayda, ku mamapatyay a tademaw ci Ce-zen malakincal a tahekal. ci Ce-zen miuningay ci U-tawan taluma' tu tusepseplim mihcaan, miput tu tunŚćć naw hinadebitay a tademaw malalumuwa a " Cuo-ye-wan-ce-lang" aci "Si-cen-te-tay" malalikelun. . ci U-taw mibetas, masasutineng aci TunŚććsakakaay ci Wang-ce'-lang aci Lung-kun-se-cin, matapal nida caay kaw la'cusay a tademaw, atu makatalay ci TunŚćć, aydaaay amikilim tu sakatineng tu tawyaay i Lun-ku miyuan anikapatay nu nikalalebuan nu TunŚćć. . kacinlawan peizi ť¨•Áą≠ÁĮá katukuh ci U-taw tu tusepseplim mihcaan, ci TunŚććmangalay paculi ci " aymei-aycu" a nikalingatu a malalebu, amica ku nikakaci, nika ci TunŚććidaw ku nidikecan tu katini' mipacuk tu aymei-aycu nu sakakaay, sadikuday mihang aku ku mipatayay sa, ci Wang-ce'-lang aci Lung-kun-se saemaema sa. ci U-taw milawlaw tu nikasasungaay nu heni a tatusa, mangalay misudikud tu aymei-aycu masakaputay atu ci TunŚćć, midebung tu i walu bulad tulu demiad tu Lung-kun-se', nika ina Lung-kun-se' kaidawan ni U-taw sa maala. mutiku tu ayda, masumad tu ku dui't, ci Ze'-sing maudip aca, nika caay ka tenes ci Ze'-sing idaw ku nipikiyakuan ni TunŚćć nu sakasizikuan a mapatay. ci U-taw matineng tu ci Lung-kun-se'-cin malamamapatay i papululan, u cumi nida u tapang namin ku mituu'ay. ś≠¶ťĀďŤá≥2005ŚĻī, . tanuidang nu wang-sen-cie Ť°ÄŤÖ•Ťź¨ŤĀĖÁĮÄÁĮá yu mahida ci U-taw namiawda tu "pa-liw-pa'-luo" mamiwawies, ci Tun Śććnamicunus tu icelang sapabeli ci Yen-ay-mei-ay-cu nu si-siaw malacen-hun kaput nu sakakaay. yi-fan sakakaay ci Cen-ti-kuy-cie mibelih tayda ci Pa-liw-pa'-luoan, sakatusa nu sakakaay ci Sun-ye-cin-tun saan musakamu, ci Cen-ti u taydaay malasepay u mamikilim ci Si-siwan nu minikudanay a siwmian. ci U-taw matineng tu anikalepacawan : malumanay ni TunŚćća tademaw ci Yi-kun-yi-hu pacuk han nida ci Cen-ti, ci Wang-ce'-lang amipaty ci Yi-huan, ci Si-siaw milinikudan tu patay malasakakaay. tusa malebut mihcaan cacay a bataan bulad tulu a bataan idaw ku cacay nu demiad, mi'ten ci nida tu nikasikawawan, sadikuday mapatay tu ci Cen-ti, nika ci Yi-hu caay ka patay, maala ni U-taw. . sa ci U-taw malayi-hun kaput nu sakakaay, mutiku aca tayni tu aydaay ci TunŚććmalasakakaay tu, saan ku tadasakakaay ci Si-siaw tu ci U-taw, Cin-tun u sepay ku nu heni sa, tusepcaypic mihcaan caycay bulad caywal demiad, kuwangen ni Si-siaw ci Cin-tun, mahka tahekalay namaka papululan nanay ci Yi-hu alaen nida ci U-taw, saan ci Yi-hu malacaculculen ci U-taw sa, tiiken setulen tukuden a maynah ci U-taw, sakamu han ci U-taw amana pisakuakuay han, ci U-taw palita han ni Yi-hu tu aydaay nida a kawaw, misuayaw tu la'cusay a tademaw ci Mikey, sakamu han ni U-taw ci TunŚćć ci Si-siaw atu ci Yen-hei-lung misakaput sa masumad, mangalay tu a edapan ni U-taw. ,ŚįćśĖľMikeyÁöĄś•ĶśÉ°, . masikad ci U-taw tuci TunŚććngan, saan cu nida ku mipatayay ci Ci-tungan, sakamusa ci Yi-hu ci Si-siaw ku mipatayay tu ci Cin-tungan a lalekalan u ci Cin-tun kina paciciay. ci Yi-hu alaen nida ci U-taw patayda ci Ce-zenan, nika ci Ce-zen amidakep ci U-tawan, sakasaan kainayi'an nu lahecian ayda ni U-taw mangalay cidida tu ku mipatayay ci Ci-ze-sin'gan. sadikuday ci U-taw masasukamel ku lima misetul aca katuku tu tusepseplim mihcaan. ci U-taw micucucu ci Yi-hu, Cin-tun tu nitungihan, paytemsa ci nida a bahbahen ci Si-siaw aci Yen-hei-lun-cu patayda ci TunŚććngan, mahinikya caay ka hidasa nayi' ku laheci. ,ťÄôś®£MikeyśČćšłćśúÉŚĘģŤźĹšłčŚéĽ. pikulisimasean nu nikalepacawan peizi ŤĀĖŚ§úśĪļśąįÁĮá ci U-taw mutiku aca tayda tu tusepseplim mihcaan maadih nida nu miliyasay ci TunŚćć a Cay-pa-cie, yamipatayay tu kaka ci Hei-lung sakakaay ci Cay-ta-suo nipiladay nida milabu tina Hei-lung Tun Śćć. saan palaheci ci Cin-tun tu nipibetasan a kawawan, misuayaw ayda ci Cin-tun tu sakapaty ni U-taw, misuayaw ci Pa-cie-yi mipatayay a kaka mamiala tu nisawacuan a kaka ci Yiu-yean, simata tu nuhenian aci Hei-lung tu nikakapahan a cudadan, itini satu i sasa a miput tu nu henian. tusepseplim mihcaan sabaw tusa bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku lima demiad, ci Si-siaw aci Pan-cin paceba manglay a miedap, ci U-taw nu tademaw aci Hei-lun masasuad, tatengaay nu mipatayay a tademaw ci Yiu-ye itini tu a mipatay nika caay ka laheci, sadikuday ci Wang-ce'-lang tayda kitidaan misupit ci Ta-suoan. . mademec tu kaku sa ci Hei-lung, milaylayay ci Cin, Ciw-cin sakamusa milab utu TunŚćć, ci Si-siaw papabelien ci U-siaw-tau tu katini' mipacuk ci TunŚćć pasu ci Lin-pan-ci. Si-saiw lawpesen ni Mikey ku ngangan ni TunŚćć, palasikian tu ci Tun Śćć nu tusaay a siicelangay hida satu makaykic, baluhay a mihcaan ci U-taw mutikuaca tayni tu aydaay, maadih nida ci Pu-tan siziku mapaty, u masakaputay ni TunŚććmatulin a mapatay, ya mipatayay han ci Wan-ce'-lan. ci Wan-ce'-lang miawda ci U-tawan patayen ci nida sa, tunika lalebuan nina tatusaay ci Ce-zen sipakay tapiingan a mikuwang ci Wan-ce'-langan, paytem satu ci U-taw amiala tu katuuday sisa misetul aca milakuuyt tu naayaway tu tusepseplim mihcaan. Mikey 2005ŚĻī. Ten-cu peizi Ś§©ÁęļÁĮá tusepsepnem a Heng-pin nu masakaputay "Ten-cu" midebung ci TunŚććngan, ci U-taw makatengil tu kamu nida i Ten-cuay a cabayen ci He'-tei sakamusa ku sakakaay ci Hei-cuan- yi-cuo cukaymasen ni Si-siaw sa. makatukuh ci U-taw tu aydaay mamikilim tu zingbuan lalikeluh sa aci Cay-ta-seo, sakamu han nida cini U-taw aci Ce-zen tu tawyaay nu mihcaan a kawawan " kun-tun-se-pen" nu hedek u Ten-cu aci TunŚććnikalepacawan a mapulung, u sakakaay han ci Wan-ce'-lang, kilul sa ci Si-siaw, Yi-cuo-na, nikudan sa ci TunŚććmalasicumiay nu masakaputay. 2006 . masasakamu ku nu heni ci TunŚćć a tademaw manglay a midakep ci U-taw zi Ce-zen, ya tatusaay kuwang han mapatay, ci U-taw aci pihacengay nu dukaan ci Ce-zen makakamel tu lima setul satu. aitida tu Hei-lung patideng tu demiadan nu tusa a buald tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa dimiadan tuya labiyi a masasetset, duma a tapiingan ci Si-siaw patayen nida ci Ay-ma, mahiniay nu caayay a lemed ci Wan-ce'-lang Lung-kun-se' naynayi tu ku laheci, macunus ni TunŚćć nu tusaay a sakakaay sidepan a maduka, ci U-fan kaput ku mihantayay, duma a tademaw ku caay pilihida a milepacaw, nika nikaydaan ni U-taw aci Ci-tun nu nikalawlawan, hida sat uku katuuday. ci Ze-sin misuayaw ci Wan-ce'-lan aci Lung-kun-se' patahekalan nida ku kakawaw ni U-taw, sa hida satu ku nu heni tatulu a malalebu, sadikuday ci Yi-cuo-na tu nikalalebuan mademec ni Wan-ce'-lang, sa ala han ci He-tei patayen naca ci Si-siaw a mipatay, ci Si-saiw han tu nika zikuan a mapatay. . tulu a demiad a nikalepacawan peizi šłČŚ§©śąįÁą≠ÁĮá taluma' tu tawyaay ci U-taw itida i aci Ze'-sin pikikungan kuwangen patayen ni MLKEY, ci MLKEY mangalay tu nipiala mibetas aca tayda tu caca nu bataan. tusepsepwal mihcaan pitu bulad pitu demiad, Kun-tun Śćć atu tuluay nu kaputan makaci. tusepsepwal mihcaan siwa bulad siwa demiad, ci U-taw mililid tu E-tay-mu-tun-cinŚććmidademec tu MLKEYnu Kun-tunŚććsa pacuken tu katini'. sadikuday ci MIKEY aci U-taw tatusa mibetas aca katukuh tu wawa nu zitayan, misumad ci Si-siaw atu katuuday tu nikasasuadaan.

¶i u-taw mar~…ĺaji-ńßun kaput nu sakakaaj, mutiku a ¶a tajni tu ajdaaj ¶i tun*mar~…ĺasakakaaj tu, saan ku tadasakakaaj ¶i si-siaw tu ¶i u-taw, ¶in-tun u s…ôpaj ku nu ńß…ôni sa, tus…ôp ¶ajpi ¶ mińß saan ¶u nida ku mipatajaj ¶i ¶i-tuŇčan, sakamusa ¶i ji-ńßu ¶i si-siaw ku mipatajaj tu ¶i ¶in-tuŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan u ¶i ¶in-tun kina pa ¶i ¶iaj. ¶i ji-ńßu ar~…ĺa…ôn nida ¶i u-taw patajda ¶i ¶…ô-z…ônan, nika ¶i ¶…ô-z…ôn amidak…ôp ¶i u-tawan, sakasaan kainaji Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian ajda ni u-taw maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶idida tu ku mipatajaj ¶i ¶i-z…ô-sin Ē~ °gan. sadikudaj ¶i u-taw masasukam…ôr~…ĺ ku r~…ĺima mis…ôtur~…ĺ a ¶a katuku tu tus…ôps…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan. ¶i u-taw mi ¶u ¶u ¶u ¶i ji-ńßu, ¶in-tun tu nituŇčińßan, pajt…ômsa ¶i nida a bańßbańß…ôn ¶i si-siaw a ¶i j…ôn-ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun- ¶u patajda ¶i tun*Ňčan, mańßinikja ¶aaj ka ńßidasa naji Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. ,**mik…ô*******. pikur~…ĺisimas…ôan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan p…ôizi ***** ¶i u-taw mutiku a ¶a tajda tu tus…ôps…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan maadińß nida nu mir~…ĺijasaj ¶i tun* a ¶aj-pa- ¶i…ô, jamipatajaj tu kaka ¶i ńß…ôi-r~…ĺuŇč sakakaaj ¶i ¶aj-ta-suo nipir~…ĺadaj nida mir~…ĺabu tina ńß…ôi-r~…ĺuŇč tun *. saan par~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ¶i ¶in-tun tu nipib…ôtasan a kawawan, misuajaw ajda ¶i ¶in-tun tu sakapatj ni u-taw, misuajaw ¶i pa- ¶i…ô-ji mipatajaj a kaka mamiar~…ĺa tu nisawa ¶uan a kaka ¶i jiu-j…ôan, simata tu nuńß…ônian a ¶i ńß…ôi-r~…ĺuŇč tu nikakapańßan a ¶udadan, itini satu i sasa a miput tu nu ńß…ônian. tus…ôps…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima d…ômiad, ¶i si-siaw a ¶i pan- ¶in pa ¶…ôba maŇčr~…ĺaj a mi…ôdap, ¶i u-taw nu tad…ômaw a ¶i ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun masasuad, tat…ôŇčaaj nu mipatajaj a tad…ômaw ¶i jiu-j…ô itini tu a mipataj nika ¶aaj ka r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, sadikudaj ¶i waŇč- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč tajda kitidaan misupit ¶i ta-suoan. . mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu kaku sa ¶i ńß…ôi-r~…ĺuŇč, mir~…ĺajr~…ĺajaj ¶i ¶in, ¶iw- ¶in sakamusa mir~…ĺab utu tun*, ¶i si-siaw papab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ¶i u-siaw-tau tu katini Ē~ ° mipa ¶uk ¶i tun* pasu ¶i r~…ĺin-pan- ¶i. si-saiw r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn ni mik…ô ku ŇčaŇčan ni tun*, par~…ĺasikian tu ¶i tun * nu tusaaj a sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ńßida satu makajki ¶, bar~…ĺuńßaj a mińß ¶aan ¶i u-taw mutikua ¶a tajni tu ajdaaj, maadińß nida ¶i pu-tan siziku mapatj, u masakaputaj ni tun*matur~…ĺin a mapataj, ja mipatajaj ńßan ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan. ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč miawda ¶i u-tawan pataj…ôn ¶i nida sa, tunika r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbuan nina tatusaaj ¶i ¶…ô-z…ôn sipakaj tapiiŇčan a mikuwaŇč ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇčan, pajt…ôm satu ¶i u-taw amiar~…ĺa tu katuudaj sisa mis…ôtur~…ĺ a ¶a mir~…ĺakuujt tu naajawaj tu tus…ôps…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan. mik…ô *****. t…ôn- ¶u p…ôizi *** tus…ôps…ôpn…ôm a ńß…ôŇč-pin nu masakaputaj "t…ôn- ¶u" mid…ôbuŇč ¶i tun*Ňčan, ¶i u-taw makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kamu nida i t…ôn- ¶uaj a ¶abaj…ôn ¶i ńß…ô Ē~ °-t…ôi sakamusa ku sakakaaj ¶i ńß…ôi- ¶uan- ji- ¶uo ¶ukajmas…ôn ni si-siaw sa. makatukuńß ¶i u-taw tu ajdaaj mamikir~…ĺim tu ziŇčbuan r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß sa a ¶i ¶aj-ta-s…ôo, sakamu ńßan nida ¶ini u-taw a ¶i ¶…ô-z…ôn tu tawjaaj nu mińß ¶aan a kawawan " kun-tun-s…ô-p…ôn" nu ńß…ôd…ôk u t…ôn- ¶u a ¶i tun*nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a mapur~…ĺuŇč, u sakakaaj ńßan ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa ¶i si-siaw, ji- ¶uo-na, nikudan sa ¶i tun*mar~…ĺasi ¶umiaj nu masakaputaj. **** . masasakamu ku nu ńß…ôni ¶i tun* a tad…ômaw maŇčr~…ĺaj a midak…ôp ¶i u-taw zi ¶…ô-z…ôn, ja tatusaaj kuwaŇč ńßan mapataj, ¶i u-taw a ¶i pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu dukaan ¶i ¶…ô-z…ôn makakam…ôr~…ĺ tu r~…ĺima s…ôtur~…ĺ satu. aitida tu ńß…ôi-r~…ĺuŇč patid…ôŇč tu d…ômiadan nu tusa a buar~…ĺd tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa dimiadan tuja r~…ĺabiji a masas…ôts…ôt, duma a tapiiŇčan ¶i si-siaw pataj…ôn nida ¶i aj-ma, mańßiniaj nu ¶aajaj a r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč r~…ĺuŇč-kun-s…ô Ē~ ° najnaji tu ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, ma ¶unus ni tun* nu tusaaj a sakakaaj sid…ôpan a maduka, ¶i u-fan kaput ku mińßantajaj, duma a tad…ômaw ku ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida a mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, nika nikajdaan ni u-taw a ¶i ¶i-tun nu nikar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, ńßida sat uku katuudaj. ¶i z…ô-sin misuajaw ¶i wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan a ¶i r~…ĺuŇč-kun-s…ô Ē~ ° patańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida ku kakawaw ni u-taw, sa ńßida satu ku nu ńß…ôni tatur~…ĺu a mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu, sadikudaj ¶i ji- ¶uo-na tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbuan mad…ôm…ô ¶ ni wan- ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč, sa ar~…ĺa ńßan ¶i ńß…ô-t…ôi pataj…ôn na ¶a ¶i si-siaw a mipataj, ¶i si-saiw ńßan tu nika zikuan a mapataj. . tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan p…ôizi ***** tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu tawjaaj ¶i u-taw itida i a ¶i z…ô Ē~ °-sin pikikuŇčan kuwaŇč…ôn pataj…ôn ni mr~…ĺk…ôj, ¶i mr~…ĺk…ôj maŇčar~…ĺaj tu nipiar~…ĺa mib…ôtas a ¶a tajda tu ¶a ¶a nu bataan. tus…ôps…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan pitu bur~…ĺad pitu d…ômiad, kun-tun * atu tur~…ĺuaj nu kaputan maka ¶i. tus…ôps…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad siwa d…ômiad, ¶i u-taw mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu …ô-taj-mu-tun- ¶in*midad…ôm…ô ¶ tu mr~…ĺk…ôjnu kun-tun*sa pa ¶uk…ôn tu katini Ē~ °. sadikudaj ¶i mik…ôj a ¶i u-taw tatusa mib…ôtas a ¶a katukuńß tu wawa nu zitajan, misumad ¶i si-siaw atu katuudaj tu nikasasuadaan.
